component.name: LoginTask
component.script:
sub init() m.top.functionName = "ValidateLogin" end sub
function panelMsg(resp as Object, fallback as String) as String if resp <> invalid and resp.message <> invalid and resp.message <> "" then return resp.message return fallback end function
sub ValidateLogin() m.top.errorMsg = "" user = m.top.user pass = m.top.pass code = m.top.code
if isEmpty(code) or isEmpty(user) or isEmpty(pass) then m.top.errorMsg = "Informe codigo, usuario e senha" m.top.validated = false return end if
deviceId = getStableDeviceId()
' 1) codigo do revendedor -> DNS liberadas (fluxo A) dnsResp = panelResellerDns(deviceId, code) if dnsResp = invalid or dnsResp.success <> true then m.top.errorMsg = panelMsg(dnsResp, "Revendedor nao encontrado") m.top.validated = false return end if if dnsResp.dns = invalid or dnsResp.dns.Count() = 0 then m.top.errorMsg = "Nenhuma DNS liberada para este revendedor" m.top.validated = false return end if
' 2) valida user/senha via Xtream contra as DNS do revendedor matchedCfg = invalid matchedJson = invalid matchedDnsId = "" for each d in dnsResp.dns dnsUrl = d.url if dnsUrl <> invalid and dnsUrl <> "" then url = dnsUrl + "/player_api.php?username=" + user.Escape() + "&password=" + pass.Escape() http = NewHttp(url) rsp = http.GetToStringWithRetry() json = ParseJson(rsp) if json <> invalid and json.user_info <> invalid and json.user_info.auth = 1 matchedCfg = { serverURL: dnsUrl, appName: "S.A Player", api_key: "46270abd00c39663cde5d450ff83cbb8", version: "4.5" } matchedJson = json matchedDnsId = d.id exit for end if end if end for
if matchedCfg = invalid then m.top.errorMsg = "Usuario ou senha invalidos" m.top.validated = false return end if
' 3) registra/vincula o MAC no painel do revendedor (fluxo B) - so com login valido loginResp = panelLogin(deviceId, code, matchedDnsId, user, pass, matchedCfg.serverURL) if loginResp = invalid or loginResp.success <> true then m.top.errorMsg = panelMsg(loginResp, "Falha ao vincular no painel") m.top.validated = false return end if
' 4) monta config_activa (DNS do revendedor) e segue o caminho de sucesso original servers = [] for each d in dnsResp.dns if d.url <> invalid and d.url <> "" then servers.Push({ serverURL: d.url, appName: "S.A Player", api_key: "46270abd00c39663cde5d450ff83cbb8", version: "4.5" }) end if end for m.global.setField("config_activa", servers)
m.global.AddField("config", "assocarray", true) m.global.setField("config", matchedCfg)
appName = matchedCfg.appName
regWrite("lock", "0000", appName) regWrite("channelCategory", FormatJSON([]), appName) regWrite("moviesCategory", FormatJSON([]), appName) regWrite("seriesCategory", FormatJSON([]), appName) regWrite("live", FormatJSON([]), appName) regWrite("movie", FormatJSON([]), appName) regWrite("series", FormatJSON([]), appName) regWrite("sort", "auto", appName) regWrite("streamFormat", "hls", appName) regWrite("userTV", matchedJson.user_info.username, appName) regWrite("passTV", matchedJson.user_info.password, appName) regDelete("forceLogin", appName) ' login manual -> auto-login volta ao normal
m.global.user = matchedJson.user_info.username m.global.pass = matchedJson.user_info.password m.global.expire = matchedJson.user_info.exp_date ' Dados de conexao pra tela "Usuario" (este fluxo de login nao preenchia -> ficava vazio) if matchedJson.user_info.max_connections <> invalid then m.global.max_connections = AnyToString(matchedJson.user_info.max_connections) if matchedJson.user_info.active_cons <> invalid then m.global.active_cons = AnyToString(matchedJson.user_info.active_cons) m.global.sort = "auto" m.global.streamFormat = "hls" m.global.timeServer = matchedJson.server_info.timestamp_now
m.top.status = matchedJson.user_info.status m.top.validated = true end sub
